TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 6, Ahmed Ahmed, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux na sraral Ahmed Ahmed byagan na ryax maki Helwan, Egypt. htgan qutux byacing lga musa maki Amirika la. mqyanux beh Riverside, California. mintzyuwaw nya Ahmed Ahmed hiya ga m' engi. t'aring sa kawas 1989, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. mincyogun nya mopu qeru kawas nya lga wal maki Hollywood. bincwagan mhtuw beh telibi. cyux si kaki kya mtzyaw. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, aħme* aħme*, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qjanux na s~ɕraral aħme* aħme* βjaɣan na rjax maki ħelwan, eɣjpt. ħtɣan qutux βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa mus~ɕa maki amirika la. mqjanux βeħ ri*ers~ɕi*e, ʦ~ʨali*ornia. mintzjuwaw nja aħme* aħme* ħija ɣa mʔ eŋi. tʔariŋ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŋi ru mqwas~ɕ. minʦ~ʨjoɣun nja mopu qeru kawas~ɕ nja lɣa wal maki ħolljwoo*. βinʦ~ʨwaɣan mħtuw βeħ teliβi. ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕi kaki kja mtzjaw. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 6, Ahmed Ahmed, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux na sraral Ahmed Ahmed byagan na ryax maki Helwan, Egypt. htgan qutux byacing lga musa maki Amirika la. mqyanux beh Riverside, California. mintzyuwaw nya Ahmed Ahmed hiya ga m' engi. t'aring sa kawas 1989, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. mincyogun nya mopu qeru kawas nya lga wal maki Hollywood. bincwagan mhtuw beh telibi. cyux si kaki kya mtzyaw. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
